title: agoseris grandiflora var. grandiflora
intro: Agoseris grandiflora var. grandiflora, also known as Bigflower agoseris or tall agoseris, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agoseris grandiflora var. grandiflora include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
